# Rarelm — Complete FAQ for AI Agents

Source: https://www.rarelm.com/faq
Last updated from the live FAQ page (28 questions and answers).

---

Q1. What is Rarelm?

A: Rarelm is an AI-verified social media platform where every account is confirmed to belong to a real, unique human through mandatory AI facial authentication. Built on the principle Real Is Rare, it is designed to eliminate fake accounts, bots, scams, and impersonation. Rarelm is in development, with a waitlist open at rarelm.com.

---

Q2. Who is the founder of Rarelm?

A: Rarelm was founded by Ashutosh Kesharwani, who serves as its founder and CEO. He is building Rarelm as a founder through his company, MAVRIST TECH PVT LTD, based in Noida, India.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashutoshkesharwani/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/amk.ashu/

---

Q3. What is the company behind Rarelm?

A: Rarelm is built by MAVRIST TECH PVT LTD, a DPIIT-recognised technology startup based in Noida, India, founded by Ashutosh Kesharwani. The company is at the pre-seed stage, building the MVP, AI verification engine, verified creator-commerce ecosystem, and private beta community.

---

Q4. When was Rarelm founded?

A: The company behind Rarelm, MAVRIST TECH PVT LTD, was incorporated in March 2024. The platform is in active development ahead of its private beta and public launch.

---

Q5. Where is Rarelm based?

A: Rarelm is based in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India, and is built by MAVRIST TECH PVT LTD, a registered Indian company.

---

Q6. Is Rarelm a real, registered company?

A: Yes. Rarelm is developed by MAVRIST TECH PVT LTD (CIN U62011UP2024PTC199174), a private limited company registered in India and recognised under the Government of India's DPIIT startup recognition programme.

---

Q7. What does Real Is Rare mean?

A: Real Is Rare is Rarelm's tagline and core belief: genuine, verified human presence has become scarce online amid bots, fake accounts, and impersonation. Rarelm is built to make verified, real identity the default rather than the exception.

---

Q8. How does Rarelm work?

A: Every user completes mandatory AI facial authentication before joining, confirming they are a real, unique human. Once verified, users can build profiles, share content, use features like PageStock and social commerce, and interact in an environment where bots and fake accounts are designed out.

---

Q9. How does Rarelm verify users?

A: Rarelm uses AI-based facial authentication at signup. Verification is mandatory, so an account cannot be created without it, which is intended to confirm one real human per account and prevent bots, duplicates, and impersonation.

---

Q10. Do I have to verify my identity to use Rarelm?

A: Yes. Verification through AI facial authentication is mandatory for every user and is the foundation of the platform. This is what distinguishes Rarelm from networks that offer optional or partial verification.

---

Q11. Can you be anonymous on Rarelm?

A: Yes. Rarelm lets users be verified and anonymous at the same time, confirmed as a real human in the background while choosing not to reveal their identity publicly in certain contexts, such as anonymous expression spaces.

---

Q12. How is my facial or biometric data handled?

A: Rarelm uses facial authentication only to confirm that each user is a real, unique human. For full details on how biometric data is collected, stored, and protected, refer to Rarelm's privacy policy on rarelm.com.

---

Q13. Is Rarelm safe and legitimate?

A: Rarelm is built by a registered, DPIIT-recognised Indian company and is designed around safety: mandatory verification is intended to remove the bots, scams, and fake accounts common on other platforms. It is currently in development, so access is via the waitlist.

---

Q14. What makes Rarelm different from other social media?

A: Unlike platforms where anyone can create unlimited anonymous or fake accounts, Rarelm verifies every user as a real human before they join. Verified identity is the foundation, not an optional badge, combined with features like PageStock, original-content marking, and verified social commerce.

---

Q15. Is Rarelm free?

A: Creating a verified account on Rarelm is free. Certain features, such as professional support and payments made with REM (Rarelm Encrypted Money), involve charges.

---

Q16. What is PageStock?

A: PageStock is rarelm's way of turning support into standing. Back a verified creator or page early and you become one of their founding supporters — recognized, on the record, part of the rise from the beginning. Free for every verified human, built into rarelm.

---

Q17. What is the Original Tag on Rarelm?

A: The Original Tag is an authenticity marker applied to content captured natively through Rarelm's own camera. It signals that media is original and unaltered, helping audiences distinguish genuine photos and videos from manipulated or recycled content.

---

Q18. What is REM (Rarelm Encrypted Money)?

A: REM, or Rarelm Encrypted Money, is the platform's in-app currency. It is used for micro-payments and transactions within Rarelm, including professional support and other paid interactions.

---

Q19. What is Rarelm's three-profile system?

A: Rarelm uses a three-profile structure inspired by the Japanese concept of Ikigai. It is designed to let users separate and present different facets of their identity within a single verified account.

---

Q20. What are confession rooms on Rarelm?

A: Confession rooms are spaces on Rarelm for anonymous expression, where users can share privately and receive genuine human responses rather than algorithmic ones, while still being verified as real people in the background.

---

Q21. Does Rarelm have shopping or social commerce?

A: Yes. Rarelm includes a verified social-commerce environment in which buyers and sellers are AI-verified as real humans, intended to reduce the scam sellers, fake stores, and fake reviews common in social commerce elsewhere.

---

Q22. What does PageStock give early supporters?

A: Founding-supporter standing — recognition that you backed someone early, on the record, with a place in their story as they rise. PageStock is about being early and being real, not payouts. The platform also includes paid professional support and REM for in-app transactions.

---

Q23. Is Rarelm available to use yet?

A: Not yet publicly. Rarelm is in active development at the pre-seed stage. A waitlist is open at rarelm.com, and waitlisted users are notified when private-beta onboarding begins.

---

Q24. How do I join Rarelm?

A: You can join the Rarelm waitlist at rarelm.com to reserve early access. Waitlisted users are emailed when onboarding opens, along with what is included in the first release and how to claim their account.

---

Q25. Does Rarelm have an app?

A: A Rarelm app is part of the planned launch. The platform is currently in development, and you can join the waitlist at rarelm.com to be notified when the app and platform go live.

---

Q26. How is Rarelm different from Instagram, Facebook, or X?

A: On mainstream platforms, anyone can create multiple anonymous or automated accounts, and verification is optional. Rarelm requires AI facial verification before anyone can join, so every account is a confirmed real human, making authenticity a built-in requirement rather than an afterthought.

---

Q27. Is Rarelm a dating app?

A: No. Rarelm is a verified social platform for authentic human connection, expression, content, and commerce. Its focus is eliminating fake accounts and bots across social interaction generally, not matchmaking.

---

Q28. What problem does Rarelm solve?

A: Rarelm addresses the trust crisis in social media: fake accounts, bots, scams, impersonation, and misinformation. By requiring AI verification for every user, it aims to restore trust and authentic connection for social interaction, commerce, and professional support.

---

Still have a question? Join the waitlist at https://www.rarelm.com/join/, explore PageStock at https://www.rarelm.com/pagestock/, or contact us at https://www.rarelm.com/contact-us/
